{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "cmstp.exe is being used with specific command-line arguments (/s and /au) to load an .inf file (T1218.003_uacbypass.inf) from a non-standard location (C:\\ProgramData). This pattern is a known technique (MITRE ATT&CK T1218.003) for User Account Control (UAC) bypass, often initiated by scripting languages like PowerShell.",
  "indicators": [
    "cmstp.exe used for UAC bypass",
    "command line arguments /s and /au",
    "loading .inf file from C:\\ProgramData",
    "filename explicitly referencing MITRE ATT&CK T1218.003",
    "parent process powershell.exe"
  ]
}
